## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test-only change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run release:check` passes locally
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Docs were updated where public behavior changed
- [ ] Public APIs follow the static factory pattern where applicable
- [ ] Secrets, tokens, and local `.env` values are not included
